evidence.quote: Personal AI assistant run on your own devices. Prioritizes user privacy, local control, and a fast, always-on experience across existing communication channels.

OpenClaw prioritizes security and trust through transparent threat modeling and community collaboration. It values proactive vulnerability reporting and clear communication channels for responsible disclosure.
Promotes secure defaults, sandboxing, and trust boundaries. Audits configurations for risks and offers safe fixes. Emphasizes caution with shared access and dangerous overrides.
OpenClaw prioritizes security and trust through transparent threat modeling and community collaboration.
Community-driven, open-source project emphasizing collaboration, security, and user-centric design across multiple platforms.
